creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Broken environment? It worked fine inside 13.3-RELEASE amd64 jail on 15.0-CURRENT amd64 host with X11/Wayland sockets passed through back during ports ce8e9999eb59. However, my testing was limited to viewing channels for less than 1 minute in order to make sure the port wasn't completely useless.

I've ported it for fun (more Gtk4 apps) but don't really use Discord. Better ask upstream.
